transcript.text:
[Have you heard of "Uh Bok Jang Ban"?] (Pyeongyang-style Beef Hot Pot)
[Variety of vegetables, beef shank, mushrooms]
[And North Korean Dumplings]
[Food from Pyongan Province (Northwest of Korea)] [Uh Bok Jang Ban]
I've never seen anyone finish the whole thing
[I'll show you]
[Warning] [You're going to want some after this video]
[So good!]
Passed down for 3 generations
[Completely filled]
This dumpling is something else
[Beef ribs too]
Shocking
[Tell me this is all a lie]
[Uh Bok Jang Ban mukbang starting now!]
Hello everyone

I came down to Cheonan because of my schedule tomorrow
There happens to be a restaurant here that I visited 2 years ago
I remember being it a very unique experience
The dish was called Uh Bok Jang Ban and I enjoyed it
Yes, this is the street I still remember it after 2 years
Ta-da Here!
[Geuni Restaurant] [Cheonan, Seobuk-gu]
Hello~!
It's going to be great!
This place has been fully booked all day
Thankfully, they allowed me to come in to film after-hours
There were no seats available even up to their closing hour
Uh Bok Jang Ban, yes This is it
Spicy version?
How different is it?
Is the spicy one really spicy?

No, it's at a moderate level and people order that more
2 original and 1 spicy? (3~4 servings each order]
Do I need 4 orders?
You won't finish it
-You can't do it -Why?
You can't eat 3 orders
-I'll still order 3 -Okay
Excuse me,
-I would like beef ribs as well -Okay!
Thank you
[Food from Pyongan Province, North Korea] [Uh Bok Jang Ban] (Pyeongyang-style Beef Hot Pot)
[Beef cuts]
[Shiitake mushrooms]
[Enoki Mushrooms]
[White Wood Ear Mushroom]
[All in a brass pot]

[North Korean Style Dumplings]
[Spicy Uh Bok Jang Ban]
[Pyongan Province, North Korea's Representative Dish]
[Here you go]
[The visuals!]
Enjoy!
Thank you
Dumplings in the front, meat in the back
It usually comes with 6 dumplings
But they ran out
So I got a few less dumplings and a lot more meats
Looks scrumptious I like meat more anyway
Win
What do I do with these (mugwort)?
I forgot it comes with mugworts
Get rid of all the greens

-I'll take them out -Sorry, thank you
[Goodbye mugwort]
-Should I leave 1? -What?
No...
A lot of people ask not to put mugwort
Let's eat the original first Spicy one later
Delicious
Such deep flavors
I want a ladle
[It's here]
That's deep
How do I explain this? Not quite like shabu broth
I've been told these dumplings have been passed down for 3 generations
Look at the size Imagine 6 of them in 1 pot
I can't eat this in 1 bite
Delicious!

That's so juicy
The juice explodes
Just like Xiao Long Bao dumpling broth
This dumpling is something else
It's completely filled with meat It's a Northern-style dumpling
This dumpling has been passed down for 3 generations, right?
My grandfather was up in North and escaped from there
I've grown up eating those dumplings on special days
And you used the same recipe
It's phenomenal
Now for the meat
It looks so good Do you guys know what this is? Brisket?
Shank
It's beef shank
That melted in my mouth
So tender Just like tenderloin

[I want some too...]
It can easily get tough if it has a lot of lean meat
Do you eat meat vertically?
[Vertical]
My mouth is not wide sideways, but it's big vertically
That makes it look even more appetizing
[Then let's eat 3 pieces vertically]
This dish is from Pyongan Province (located Northwest of Korea)
A dish for the whole family to gather around and enjoy
Wrap the meat with enoki mushrooms
Shiitake mushroom too
These Northern foods are generally...
A little bland, but very addicting
This is just like that
It's a broth with deep flavors
With less salt?

Keeps going in with ease
Some cabbage too
This wood ear mushroom is white
Dip it
It's got a great texture
Meat with wood ear mushrooms
Lovely
I cut it in half, but it's still very big
That's really tasty
Dumplings taste even better now
Some vegetables too
I'll eat some veggies today
Cabbage is really sweet
Now for the spicy
Looks similar to Yukgaejang (spicy beef soup)
I like it

It's not spicy
The spice level is similar to Yukgaejang
What's this? It's not fat
Like muscle string?
Collagen
Chewy and crunchy
The meat is getting elastic over time
So good
That's insane
This is for a hangover
Meat
[Bathe it with some soup]
Cut it up
All that filling
Some veggies too
How's the meat so tender?

It's supposed to get dry over time, but it's not like that It just melts
My mouth is not spicy, but my mind(?) is
What am I saying?
I can feel the spice inside
Should I try to eat it in 1 bite?
This hot soup is very light and addicting
Excuse me,
-Would you like the ribs now? -Yes, I'd like that
Thank you
[Are you looking for me?]
[Beef ribs with smokey flavor]
[Meat is love]
Thank you
Looks so good
Delish
Sweet and salty As it should be

Wasabi here too
He knows what's up
Some on there
I said the soup was a bit bland
This will go well with it
It has a kick to it
It has some spice and it's yummy
Not spicy though
Dumpling
In 1 bite
I don't think I can do it
It's too big to eat in 1 bite
I can't do it
It'll be embarrassing if I fail
[We're watching]
The atmosphere changed

Feels like I need to succeed now
[Why were we even nervous?]
[Respect]
[She always goes above and beyond]
Xiao Long Bao filled with savory broth
It's like that but with more fillings
I have only 1 left already?
I wonder if it still tastes good
It does...
Let's take the meat out
The collagen part of the meat is very delicious
Really gelatinous
[Focusing on the meat now]
The broth should taste even better now too
Some mushrooms on top
These dumplings are humongous

They're bigger than King Dumplings
Is that all the meat?
There it is
When did you start eating a lot?
Middle school
Wait, I was a good eater back in elementary too
Are your parents also good-eaters?
My parents? Not quite
My brother used to be, but not anymore
Shocking
Dumpling
It's gotten cold, but it's still excellent
The fillings are not just there
I can taste the quality
[Where did they go?]
Thank you

[There are empty too?]
Did she finish it all?
[Take a look at this]
[Really?]
Did the producer help you eat while we were gone?
You will have to earn a lot of money
If you're going to keep eating like this
1 last bite
Thanks, everyone!
I didn't even eat that much today
You weren't as big of an eater back in middle school, right?
No, I used to eat even more than now
[A continuation of amazement]
[The year 2022 is here] (Year of the Tiger) [May all of my subscribers receive an abundant amount of Tiger energy and have a happy year] [Happy New Year!] [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
